title: Knarfy Mod beta
description:
The Mod that adds Knarfy.
Suggestions were from the Knarfy Discord
body:
All Current Features:
- Knarfy Mob that spawns on every advancement after you obtain the dragon egg
- BSOD Ore
- BSOD Dimension
- BSOD Item For throwing, Knarfy uses these
- BSOD Water, explodes when entitys touch it
- BSOD and steel, tp light the portal to the BSOD dimension
- BSOD biome, very blue
- BSOD Armor
- Bred 
- Bred bush (Not Sure if this spawns naturally, or is just really rare)
- Bred Block
- Baked Bred Block
- Bred tools


Check Out my Game Studio, Chicken Pie Studios: https://chicken-pie-studios.itch.io/
